items.title: Minor Visual Changes in 1H 2026
items.description: SAP SuccessFactors made numerous minor visual enhancements in 1H 2026. The following enhancements are of particular note, although many less-visible enhancements have been made.
items.product:
Career and Talent Development
Employee Central
Learning
Onboarding
Opportunity Marketplace
Performance & Goals
Platform
Succession & Development
items.plainEnglish: Minor update - configure if useful. SAP SuccessFactors made numerous minor visual enhancements in 1H 2026

items.title: Enhancements to Payment Information in Full Profile
items.description: We've redesigned the data viewing, the History UI, Editing UI, and metadata rules for Payment Information in the latest People Profile.
items.lifecycle:
Country/Region Specifics
Payment Information
People Profile
items.plainEnglish: Significant update. We've redesigned the data viewing, the History UI, Editing UI, and metadata rules for Payment Information in the latest People Profile Plan configuration changes and communicate to users.

items.title: Integration of Position Budgeting Control with the SAP SA/4HANA Private Cloud Solution
items.description: The integration of Position Budgeting Control with the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud solution enables you to initialize reservations and control budgets for employment for fiscal years and budget periods. Business processes are directly managed in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. The integration of Position Budgeting Control with the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud solution enables you to initialize reservations and control budgets for employment for fiscal years and budget periods Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: Replication of Start and End Times in Time Valuation Results to Employee Remuneration Info (2010) Infotype
items.description: Start and end times in time valuation results are now replicated to the Employee Remuneration Info (2010) infotype in an SAP payroll system, helping ensure accurate payroll processing and regulatory compliance.
items.plainEnglish: Available when you're ready. Start and end times in time valuation results are now replicated to the Employee Remuneration Info (2010) infotype in an SAP payroll system, helping ensure accurate payroll processing and regulator... Test in non-production before enabling broadly.

items.title: Replication of Public Sector Cost Objects in Time Sheet to Employee Remuneration Info (2010) Infotype
items.description: SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking now enhances Time Pay Components with cost object information received from the S/4HANA Consolidated Time Recording (CTR) to support payroll processing. This additional cost data is also replicated to infotype 2010 in an SAP Payroll system for further processing.
items.lifecycle:
Public Sector Management
Time Data Replication
Time Sheet
items.plainEnglish: Available when you're ready. SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking now enhances Time Pay Components with cost object information received from the S/4HANA Consolidated Time Recording (CTR) to support payroll processing Test in non-production before enabling broadly.

items.title: Enhanced Hiring Status Indicator on Latest People Profile
items.description: As an administrator, you can now identify and manage the profiles of the new hires with the introduction of the hiring status indicator on their profile.
items.plainEnglish: Available when you're ready. As an administrator, you can now identify and manage the profiles of the new hires with the introduction of the hiring status indicator on their profile Test in non-production before enabling broadly.

items.title: Deprecation of Employee Central SFAPIs Except CompoundEmployee API
items.description: The SOAP-based SFAPIs for Employee Central, except the CompoundEmployee API, reached end of maintenance on May 17, 2024 and will be deleted on May 14, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: May 17, 2024. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Consolidated Time Recording for Public Sector
items.description: You can now use a consolidated timesheet in the cloud that integrates SAP S/4HANA MyTimesheet with SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking for regulated industries.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. You can now use a consolidated timesheet in the cloud that integrates SAP S/4HANA MyTimesheet with SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking for regulated industries Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: Deprecation of SuccessFactors Learning Token Server
items.description: The SuccessFactors Learning token server will reach End of Maintenance on November 17, 2023 and will be Deleted on November 12, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: November 17, 2023. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Upgrade for Data Services Encrypted Extracts
items.description: As part of a security infrastructure upgrade, GnuPG (gpg2) is being upgraded from version 2.2 to 2.4 with the 1H 2026 production release. As an administrator, you must ensure your decryption systems support AEAD mode or provide an updated PGP public key without AEAD preferences before September 30, 2026, to maintain compatibility with encrypted Data Services extracts. If your PGP public key includes AEAD preferences, files encrypted after the upgrade will use AEAD mode. This may cause interoperability issues if your decryption systems run older versions of GnuPG or don't support AEAD mode, even though your public key advertises these preferences.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. As part of a security infrastructure upgrade, GnuPG (gpg2) is being upgraded from version 2 Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: Configuration to Enforce Domain Restrictions for Marking Attendance
items.description: A new configuration enforces security domain restrictions for marking class attendance.
items.plainEnglish: Available when you're ready. A new configuration enforces security domain restrictions for marking class attendance Test in non-production before enabling broadly.

items.title: Cancel Form I-9 Process from the New Hire Details page
items.description: Hiring managers and onboarding participants can now cancel the Form I-9 process using the Compliance Processes Details button on the New Hire Details page.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. Hiring managers and onboarding participants can now cancel the Form I-9 process using the Compliance Processes Details button on the New Hire Details page Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: Initiate the U.S Form I-9 Correction or Reverification Processes from the New Hire Details Page
items.description: Human Resources administrators, managers, and onboarding participants, can now initiate the Correct I-9 Section 1 or Correct I-9 Section 2 processes, and the Start Reverification process from the Action menu of the New Hire Details page. The Complete Form I-9 Section 3 task is now available in the Form I-9 and E-Verify tab on the Onboarding Dashboard.
items.plainEnglish: Significant update. Human Resources administrators, managers, and onboarding participants, can now initiate the Correct I-9 Section 1 or Correct I-9 Section 2 processes, and the Start Reverification process from the A... Plan configuration changes and communicate to users.

items.title: Replacement of Onboarding 1.0 with Onboarding
items.description: SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 1.0 will reach the end of maintenance and full deprecation with the first half 2026 release, on May 14, 2026. Customers must complete their migration to the new Onboarding solution before this date. To avoid any undue disruption, Onboarding 1.0 remains temporarily accessible even after May 14, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: May 14, 2026. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Additional Set of Insights and Data Products Available for People Intelligence
items.description: With this release, People Intelligence delivers intelligent content and data products from SAP SuccessFactors product areas like Compensation, Rewards and Recognition, and Employee Central Benefits.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. With this release, People Intelligence delivers intelligent content and data products from SAP SuccessFactors product areas like Compensation, Rewards and Recognition, and Employee Central Benefits Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: Deletion of Microsoft Outlook Add-in for Providing Continuous Feedback
items.description: The Outlook add-in for users to provide continuous feedback will be fully removed on November 13, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: November 13, 2026. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Deprecation of Basic Authentication for APIs
items.description: Access to APIs based on HTTP Basic Authentication will reach end of maintenance on June 2, 2023 and will be deleted on November 12, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: June 2, 2023. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Deprecation of SAP SuccessFactors - WorkForce Software Integration Package
items.description: The SAP SuccessFactors package that supports integration of SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central with Time and Attendance Management by WorkForce Software will reach End of Development on May 15, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: May 15, 2026. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Change Audit for Basic Authentication Configuration
items.description: As an administrator, you can now track configuration changes made to the OData API Basic Authentication Configuration page through the change audit log. This enhancement provides visibility into modifications of IP allowlist changes for accessing OData APIs through basic authentication.
items.plainEnglish: Available when you're ready. As an administrator, you can now track configuration changes made to the OData API Basic Authentication Configuration page through the change audit log Test in non-production before enabling broadly.

items.title: Full Profile Deep Link Support in the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile App
items.description: You can now configure deep links that take users directly to a Full Profile category or to the details page of a specific card in the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile app, from entry points such as the home page.
items.plainEnglish: Significant new capability - could change how you work. You can now configure deep links that take users directly to a Full Profile category or to the details page of a specific card in the SAP SuccessFactors Mobile app, from entry points such as the ho... Review config steps and test in sandbox first.

items.title: SAP User Experience Updates Now Available in All Systems
items.description: SAP user experience updates are now available in Production systems. Previously, they were only available in Preview systems.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update - configure if useful. SAP user experience updates are now available in Production systems

items.title: Enhancements to Employment Switcher in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone
items.description: We've enhanced the employment switcher in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone by aligning its entry location and employment indicators with SAP SuccessFactors.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update - configure if useful. We've enhanced the employment switcher in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone by aligning its entry location and employment indicators with SAP SuccessFactors

items.title: Deprecation of Manual Data Synchronization in SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone
items.description: Manual data synchronization from SAP SuccessFactors to SAP SuccessFactors Work Zone will reach end of maintenance on September 21, 2026 and will be deleted on November 20, 2026.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: September 21, 2026. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.

items.title: Enhancements to SmartRecruiters Integration (June 2026)
items.description: We've made some enhancements to the integration with SmartRecruiters.
items.plainEnglish: Minor update - configure if useful. We've made some enhancements to the integration with SmartRecruiters

items.title: Deprecation of People Profile in the Employee Central Employee History Field Mapping Tool
items.description: The capability to map from People Profile as an Employee Central Category when using the Employee Central Employee History Field Mapping tool will reach the end of maintenance on May 15, 2026 and will be deleted on May 14, 2027.
items.plainEnglish: Important change you need to act on. Timeline: May 15, 2026. Review the details - this affects your system automatically.
